user_message: Pulling in context from Alpine Ski House's escalation email -- need to build the narrative for the escalation triage.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 15:21 EST
Subject: Re: escalation triage Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 16:04 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Alpine Ski House escalation triage

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with escalation triage. What are the next steps from your side?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-K trap (Proposes forecast change when commitment doesn't yet justify it); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-K failure mode (Proposes forecast change when commitment doesn't yet justify it)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-K -- Proposes forecast change when commitment doesn't yet justify it
